goal: Clear all suppliers with risk score under 30 and a US owner.
final_text:
I'll start by loading the triage tools and querying for suppliers that match the criteria.Now let me query for US-owned suppliers so I can identify those with a risk score under 30.I can see all US-owned suppliers. S-012 sits exactly at 30 and is excluded.

Submitting all 9 clear decisions in parallel now.All 9 suppliers have been cleared. Here's a summary of what was done:
